prose: The HOMO-LUMO gap of aniline calculated with DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP), in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1, converged in 9 SCF cycles. Total energy: -287.71578 Hartree. Orbitals and energies are reported as part of the frontier-orbitals calculation with the specified method.
